ham.subject: VPN Maintenance Scheduled for 15th Sep 2026 – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on **15th September 2026, 02:00 AM – 04:00 AM IST**. During this window, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable.

**What you need to do:**
- Ensure you have backed up any critical work.
- If you are working remotely, plan to log in after 04:00 AM.
- For urgent access, please contact the helpdesk with the ticket ID: VPN-2026-09-15.

This maintenance is part of our ongoing effort to improve security and performance. Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

---
IT Operations
Corporate Headquarters

spam.subject: Urgent: Your IT Ticket #12345 Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We have detected a critical issue with your IT ticket **#12345** that requires immediate attention. As per our internal security protocols, failure to resolve this within 48 hours may result in account suspension.

**Ticket Details**
- Issue: Unauthorized access attempt detected
- Date reported: 12th Sep 2026
- Priority: High

To verify and reset your credentials, please click on the link below and follow the instructions:

<URL>

If you do not complete the verification by **14th Sep 2026**, your access to the corporate network will be revoked.

Regards,

Rajesh Kumar
Chief Security Officer
IT Security Division
